name: libhtml-linkextractor-perl
title: libhtml-linkextractor-perl
summary: Perl module used to extract links from HTML documents
description:
Perl module used to extract links from HTML documents
HTML::LinkExtractor is used to extract links from HTML documents.  It is very
similar to HTML::LinkExtor, except that besides getting the URL, you also get
the link-text.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libhtml-linkextractor-perl because Perl module used to extract links from HTML documents.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libhtml-linkextractor-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libhtml-linkextractor-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libhtml-linkextractor-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
